text: I got hit by a car in San Francisco. I had to crawl off the road before another car ran me over.
Started studying peptides and hormone therapy and advanced training. And I went from being unable
to walk to being able to like climb on rope ladders with just my hands. And it's crazy because
you know when I started doing this stuff 20 years ago everyone was telling me I'm crazy,
I'm gonna kill myself, and I don't think someone like Jeff Bezos would have been following me 20
years ago. But now everybody is into this stuff.
